text: Here I sit, angled in the corridor, peering through the glass into a space dedicated to R+D—Research and Development. The vibrant mural and technological displays draw my attention, suggesting innovation thrives here. I feel a kind of anticipation and curiosity, as if I am on the threshold of discovery, invited to contemplate the ever-evolving relationship between humanity and technology. The atmosphere urges reflection on progress, knowledge, and our capacity to create.
